event: Military cavalry procession through a burning town
description: A military scene showing a column of mounted cavalry officers riding through a burning or smoke-filled town at night or dusk. The riders are in formal military uniforms with plumed helmets, riding in formation along a wide street. Buildings on either side glow with fire or are obscured by smoke. The entire scene is bathed in warm orange, pink, and purple hues from the flames and atmospheric haze. Scattered figures appear along the edges of the street. The painting conveys a sense of martial grandeur amid destruction.

_meta.title: The Return from the Petroff Palace
